import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut sum = 0
mut count = 0
mut tok = ""
while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
    if not string.is_empty(tok)
      let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      sum = sum + v
      count = count + 1
      tok = ""
    end
  else
    tok = "#{tok}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end
if not string.is_empty(tok)
  let v = match string.parse_int(tok)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  sum = sum + v
  count = count + 1
end
let avg = sum / count
print("avg=#{avg}")
